name: browser-automation
description: BeSpunky browser-automation skills. Currently ships the `playwright` skill — drive a real browser (load, click, type, screenshot, scrape) when you need to verify UI behavior end-to-end, reproduce a bug in the running app, or generate repeatable browser scripts. Enabled by default in BeSpunky devcontainers, which pre-install Playwright + Chromium so the skill is ready the moment the container opens. Grows over time with adjacent skills (visual regression, codegen workflows, …).
